name: caponata
instructions: fry diced eggplant in olive oil until tender. saute celery and yellow onions separately. combine with canned tomatoes, capers, olives, raisins, pine nuts, red wine vinegar, and a touch of sugar. simmer until jammy. serve room temp.
notes: sicilian sweet-and-sour eggplant. the sweet-sour balance (raisins/sugar against vinegar/capers) is the whole point.
